perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a grey off-the-shoulder mesh top stands in a warehouse store aisle next to a shelf of potted plants. She touches the leaves of a Monstera plant while looking at the camera and talking. (2) The camera zooms in on the white potted plants and a price tag showing $569. Hand movements point to the large, green leaves of several plants on the shelf. (3) The woman is shown again, gesturing with her hands as she explains something, later holding a small silver handbag. (4) The camera focuses on the care instructions on the price label. (5) The woman gives a thumbs up to the camera in the final shot.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic-style background music plays throughout. A male voice introduces the woman as a 'forest-style girl' who will introduce the plants. (2) A female voice responds with a playful tone, laughing and admitting she isn't that familiar with them. (3) The male voice continues to prompt her, highlighting the price of $569. (4) The female voice provides specific care tips, such as not leaving them outside in the cold and cleaning the leaves. (5) Occasional 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects (SFX) occur when text overlays appear. (6) Ambient warehouse store noise is muffled in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. (3) Hook Text: '誇張便宜' (Exaggeratedly cheap) and '超美龜背芋盆栽' (Super beautiful Monstera potted plant) in colorful, bubbly fonts. (4) Decorative Text: '龜背葉' vs '龜背芋' appearing with question marks to emphasize a correction in the plant's name. (5) Decorative Text: '好大片喔' (So big) and '也都是漂亮的' (Are also beautiful) highlighting product features.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Display & Price Reveal -> Care Instruction Commentary -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 child visible in the background sitting on a bench at 0:35.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black Kangol beret, a sheer grey off-the-shoulder long-sleeve top, and light blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with metal shelving, cardboard boxes, and various merchandise in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Expert Tips -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a product review and shopping recommendation for Monstera plants at Costco, emphasizing their low price, aesthetic appeal, and providing practical care advice to potential buyers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a specific retailer (Costco) and a specific product with price information, presented in a positive 'must-buy' review format.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: On-screen persona as a 'forest-style girl' (森林系女孩) and friendly banter between the camera operator and the lead.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of variety-show style captions and the focus on a specific bargain price suggests this is targeted at value-conscious lifestyle shoppers.
